evidence.scientific_clarity: Four conditions in correct brief order with sig. brackets; caption states dose-dependent suppression and Combo as greatest — claim is fully legible.
evidence.typography: Script sets no pdf.fonttype=42 or svg.fonttype; pdffonts confirms Type 3 DejaVu Sans (matplotlib default) — text is not editable TrueType.
evidence.palette: Red (#D65F5F) and green (#6ACC65) used for categorical dose levels — red-green pair fails common colorblindness test and implies unintended directionality.
evidence.layout_density: 5.5×4.5 in figure with tight_layout; no gaping whitespace, no overlapping labels; y-range padded sensibly above top bracket.
evidence.reviewer_readiness: Caption matches all figure elements accurately; conditions serve as legend via x-axis labels; specific finding stated with numerical support.
evidence.vector_fidelity: PDF is 28 KB (non-trivial) but pdffonts shows Type 3 fonts; script lacks rcParams pdf.fonttype=42, so text is not selectable TrueType.
evidence.file_format: figure.pdf, figure.png, figure.svg, caption.tex, and gen_figure.py all exist and are non-trivial in size.
evidence.caption_quality: Describes all visual layers (violin=KDE, box=IQR, whiskers=1.5×IQR, line=median, points=jittered α=0.35); states n=100; gives specific dose-dependent finding.

overall_strengths: All required output files present and non-trivial (PDF, PNG, SVG, caption, script)
Caption is detailed, accurate, and includes specific numerical claims plus a clear scientific finding
overall_weaknesses: No pdf.fonttype=42 — PDF embeds Type 3 (DejaVu Sans) fonts instead of selectable TrueType; script also omits svg.fonttype
Red-green color pair (#D65F5F, #6ACC65) is not colorblind-safe and uses directional hues for categorical dose conditions
